mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_token (id, user_id, access_token, refresh_token, token_type, expire_time, refresh_expire_time, version, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{tokenType}, #{expireTime}, #{refreshExpireTime}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE t_token SET status = 'INVALID' WHERE access_token = #{accessToken}
UPDATE t_token SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, refresh_expire_time = #{refreshExpireTime}, version = version + 1, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
